title: Hadoop Use Cases vs. Run Time Environments
description: Tom Phelan, Chief Architect and co-founder, BlueData This presentation will investigate the advantages and disadvantages of running a Hadoop cluster in each of the following environments: • bare metal • public cloud (i.e. Amazon EMR, Azure, GCE, Rackspace etc) • private cloud (i.e. on-premises cloud) • in cloud environments • cloud using a traditional virtual machine environment • cloud using a containerized virtual environment
